texto: Flying, for some reason, has never been my favorite thing, but after taking some aviation classes and reading about it and learning about it... They've been doing this for over a hundred years, they've been to the moon and back; they kind of have a good system going here.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Mosley sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Flying, for some reason, has never been my favorite thing, but after taking some aviation classes…” articula sabedoria, good, reading em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como reading e moon.
